title: Attach mute timing to a policy

blocks.content: Now you'll attach the time interval you created to a notification policy. Once attached, notifications matching that policy are suppressed during the interval's schedule.
To attach the mute timing, complete the following steps:
Navigate to **Alerts & IRM > Alerting > Notification policies**.
On the default policy row, click the **More** button (⋯) to open the actions menu.

Click **Edit** from the dropdown menu.

The default policy editing form opens.

In the **Mute timings** dropdown, select the time interval you just created.

You can attach multiple mute timings to the same policy. Notifications are suppressed whenever any attached mute timing is active.

Click **Update policy** to save your changes.

The policy tree refreshes. The mute timing now appears on the policy, and notifications are automatically suppressed during the scheduled interval.

Your mute timing is now active on the notification policy. Notifications are automatically suppressed during the scheduled interval.

In the next milestone, you'll review what you accomplished.
